UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE LIKLIHOOD OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS; DOESN'T CITE A CLEAR PROMISE TO SUPPORT PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL CAUSE OF ACTION WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE FAILS BECAUSE CIVIL CODE 2923.5 DOESN'T APPLY BECAUSE PROPERTY NOT OWNER OCCUPIED. PLAINTIFF DOESN'T DEMONSTRATE AN UNFAIR, UNLAWFUL OR FRAUDULENT BUSINESS PRACTICE. DEFENDANT MERELY EXERCISES ITS RIGHTS UNDER THE DEED OF TRUST. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Defendants' Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendants' AMERICA'S SERVICING CO AND WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Demurrer To Complaint is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised in demurrer, no opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS AMERICA'S SERVICING CO. and WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on the same date and time. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Dec-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-30-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Continued To Sep-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Continued To Jul-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Continued To May-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction is denied. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate liklihood of prevailing on the merits; doesn't cite a clear promise to support promissory estoppel cause of action wrongful foreclosure fails because Civil Code 2923.5 doesn't apply because property not owner occupied. Plaintiff doesn't demonstrate an unfair, unlawful or fraudulent business practice. Defendant merely exercises its rights under the deed of trust. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Continued To Mar-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. Parties written stipulation to continue the matter to FEB-23-2012 is not amenable with the Court's calendar. Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction is continued to MAR-05-2012. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Not Reported
